Imports

common, js/minifier, js/bundler, css/minifier, css/bundler, validator

Types

MinifyResult = object
  code*: string
  sourceMapRaw*: string

Procs

proc bundle(entryPoint: string; opts: BundleConfig = defaultConfig()): string {....raises: [
    ValueError, OSError, IOError, KeyError, OpenParserYamlError, Exception,
    OpenAstParsingError, CSSParseError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect, RootEffect, ReadDirEffect], forbids: [].}
proc minify(code: string; ext: string; opts: BundleConfig = defaultConfig()): string {....raises: [
    KeyError, ValueError, OpenParserYamlError, Exception, OpenAstParsingError,
    CSSParseError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
proc minifyAndBundle(entryPoint: string; outputPath: string;
                     opts: BundleConfig = defaultConfig()): string {....raises: [
    ValueError, OSError, IOError, KeyError, OpenParserYamlError, Exception,
    OpenAstParsingError, CSSParseError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect, RootEffect, ReadDirEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
proc minifyFile(path: string; opts: BundleConfig = defaultConfig()): MinifyResult {....raises: [
    IOError, KeyError, ValueError, OpenParserYamlError, Exception,
    OpenAstParsingError, CSSParseError], tags: [ReadIOEffect, RootEffect],
    forbids: [].}
proc minifyWithSourceMap(code: string; ext: string;
                         opts: BundleConfig = defaultConfig();
                         sourceFile: string = ""): MinifyResult {....raises: [
    KeyError, ValueError, OpenParserYamlError, Exception, OpenAstParsingError,
    CSSParseError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}

Exports

BundleConfig, JsGenOptions, jsGenOptsWithMangle, defaultConfig, defaultJsGenOpts, validateJs, validateCss, validate
